summary: The project now has three bounded workflow templates, tool-backed local file, CSV, JSON, and HTTP context analysis, bounded dataset computation, structured outputs in multiple formats, audit persistence, acceptance coverage, and a guided Streamlit inspection UI. The current push is to continue broadening routing without dropping bounded controls.
completed_items: Closed-loop supervisor orchestration with research, writing, and optional review stages
Bounded workflow planning that routes between research, analysis, and hybrid advisory-plus-context requests
Structured workflow output with pretty, JSON, and Markdown renderers
Local tool integration with file preview, CSV analysis, JSON analysis, bounded dataset computation, and bounded HTTP fetch adapters
Local audit persistence, acceptance reporting, request cache, and retry plumbing
Guided Streamlit inspection for task input, plan preview, route warnings, intermediate results, recent runs, and result export
next_items: Continue broadening workflow planning beyond the current three bounded templates
Add more guarded domain-specific analysis tools on top of the structured data path
Extend guided inspection to acceptance and cache surfaces
